description_long: This house features a modern, angular design with a flat roof and a mix of black and white exterior walls. The front includes a circular driveway with a landscaped island of palm trees, flanked by a gated entrance. The rear of the house opens to a spacious backyard with a swimming pool, hot tub, and outdoor seating area, surrounded by a privacy wall. Large windows and sliding glass doors provide ample natural light and connect the indoor and outdoor spaces. The structure appears to have two stories, with balconies and terraces overlooking the garden and pool. The overall layout emphasizes open, functional outdoor living and contemporary architectural lines.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, landscaped front drive, and a backyard featuring a pool and outdoor lounge areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gated entrance, circular driveway, and landscaped island with palm trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the transition from the front drive to the backyard, with visible terraces and green spaces.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a swimming pool, hot tub, outdoor seating, and large windows facing the garden.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, palm trees, and the full extent of the backyard and pool area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Gated main entry with a circular driveway, landscaped island, and a prominent front door set back under a flat overhang
